mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( login_id, password, name, email, role_code, created_at ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{roleCode}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.name, u.email, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasting_note tn WHERE tn.user_id = u.user_id AND tn.is_deleted = 'N' ) AS noteCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `like` l WHERE l.user_id = u.user_id ) AS likeCount
FROM user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY user_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET login_id = #{loginId}, name = #{name}, email = #{email}, role_code = #{roleCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET is_deleted = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
